answer: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title saw an overstated escrow disbursement reconciliation variance because `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id`, which is not unique at closing-role grain. The fix is to use `closing_party_role_id` and rebuild `finance.disbursement_recon_daily`.

facts.remediation: Switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title by rebuilding finance.disbursement_recon_daily
facts.root_cause: settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge by normalized_tax_id, causing duplicate escrow disbursements because that tax ID can map to multiple buyer and seller roles in the same closing
